channel.title: Ironline
channel.description: Stories about the people who build things.
channel.itunes:author: Ironline
channel.itunes:summary: Stories about the people who build things.

item.title: The Future Economy — The Box
item.description: Three weeks after her grandmother's death, Kirin Saleh finds a hidden box in the linen closet. Inside: a mysterious object that predates every system she knows, and a note that says "Be patient with what it asks of you." As a materials analyst in the Compact — a future economy built on real assets and verified physical work — Kirin can read any surface. But this one doesn't match anything in the database. An archivist traces it to a pre-Compact protocol pointing to coordinates four hundred miles into the empty zone. Then she finds the photograph: her grandmother, young and radiant, standing in front of a building that shouldn't exist. Episode 1 of The Future Economy, a serialized science fiction series set 100 years from now.

item.title: Ironline — Coming Soon
item.description: Stories about the people who build things. New episodes coming soon.
